info.title: DGrid AI Gateway API
info.description: A single, unified API to access 200+ leading AI models. OpenAI-, Claude-, and Gemini-compatible endpoints for chat, completions, embeddings, images, audio, and moderations.

post.description: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions for standard multi-turn chat, structured output, and tool calling. Model names use the `provider/model-name` format, for example `openai/gpt-4o`. Image-capable models can also return generated images through this endpoint.

response_format.description: Response schema or JSON mode config.

messages.content: What is the meaning of life?

post.description: OpenAI Responses API for stateful flows, reasoning-specific options, and newer OpenAI tooling patterns.

input.description: Input text or structured input items.

post.description: Claude Messages API for Anthropic-compatible payloads, tool use, and system prompts.

content.description: Message content string or content blocks.

text.description: Text body when the content type is text.

post.description: Gemini-native generateContent interface for text chat, multimodal media recognition (images, audio, video), speech synthesis, and image generation with structured parts. Use `generationConfig` to request specific response modalities such as speech (`speechConfig`) or images (`imageConfig`).

contents.description: Input content array with role and parts.

responseModalities.description: Requested response modalities, such as `TEXT`, `AUDIO`, or `IMAGE`.

candidates.description: Candidate responses returned by the model.

role.description: Role in the generated content block.

post.description: Classic OpenAI-compatible text completion for single-prompt generation workloads that do not require a multi-message chat schema.

suffix.description: Optional suffix for insertion use cases.

logprobs.description: Number of log probability values to return.

echo.description: Include the prompt in the output.

post.description: OpenAI-compatible embeddings for retrieval, clustering, and semantic similarity workloads.
Legacy engine-based embeddings path format for older SDK integrations.

parameters.name: engine
parameters.description: Engine identifier used in the request path.

model.description: Embedding model ID used in the JSON body.

post.description: OpenAI-compatible image generation. Also accepts Qwen-compatible payloads (`wanx-v1` style models) using an `input.messages` wrapper instead of `prompt`.

example.prompt: A cute baby sea otter wearing a beret

post.description: Edit an uploaded image with an optional mask using the OpenAI-compatible image editing endpoint. Also accepts Qwen-compatible JSON payloads with an `input.messages` wrapper.

image.description: Source image in PNG format, under 4 MB.

200.description: Edited images in the image generation response format.

post.description: Convert text into natural speech with the OpenAI-compatible audio speech interface. Returns a binary audio stream — save the response body directly to a file.

input.description: Text to synthesize, up to 4096 characters.

post.description: Transcribe uploaded audio into text with the OpenAI-compatible Whisper-style interface. Supported formats: FLAC, MP3, MP4, MPEG, MPGA, M4A, OGG, WAV, and WebM.

language.description: ISO-639-1 language code, such as `en`, `zh`, or `ko`.

prompt.description: Optional prompt for biasing the transcript.

200.description: Transcript. When `response_format` is `verbose_json`, the response also includes `task`, `language`, `duration`, and per-segment timing metadata.

post.description: Translate uploaded audio into English with the OpenAI-compatible translation endpoint.

text.description: English translation of the uploaded audio.

post.description: OpenAI-compatible content safety checks for user-generated or model-generated text. Evaluates input against categories such as hate, harassment, self-harm, sexual content, and violence.

example.input: I want to hug a puppy.

categories.description: Boolean category decisions (hate, harassment, self-harm, sexual, violence, and threatening variants).

get.description: Retrieve all models visible to the current API key. The result is permission-aware and scoped to the key's assigned access group.

data.description: List of model objects visible to the current API key.

id.description: Model ID used in downstream API requests (e.g. `openai/gpt-5.4`).

supported_endpoint_types.description: Endpoint types the model supports: `openai` (Chat Completions), `openai-response` (Responses API), `image-generation` (Image APIs).

bearerAuth.description: Your DGrid API key. All endpoints use `Authorization: Bearer <DGRID_API_KEY>`.

url.description: Image URL when using URL output.

revised_prompt.description: Refined prompt returned by the model.
